title: Puerto Rico
subtitle: December 2022 island trip
summary: I wanted to visit Puerto Rico ever since we saw this island in the 2019 ICM contest. It was basically the Hawaii for the Eastern America with lower price and richer history. I really enjoyed the sunset we saw in San Juan.

blocks.text: I was planning a trip with some Cornellian friends initially, but they had their private plan and ditched me before I knew. Nevertheless, I still find some old college friends who were also graduating and interested in visiting this Carribean island.
This is the route we took:
